content: Phase 1 POC: Set up backend structure and MongoDB models for Order, Payment
Phase 1 POC: Create Stripe payment integration with checkout session
Phase 1 POC: Implement COD (Cash on Delivery) order flow
Phase 1 POC: Build webhook handler for Stripe payment status updates
Phase 1 POC: Create test script to validate Stripe + COD + order state transitions
Phase 1 POC: Test and fix until payment flows work reliably
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design agent
Phase 2: Build backend - Product, Category, Cart, Order APIs
Phase 2: Build frontend - Home, Products, Cart, Checkout pages
Phase 2: Integrate Stripe + COD payment in checkout flow
Phase 2: Add sample 20-30 electronics products with Cloudinary images
Phase 2: End-to-End testing using testing agent
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
